title: meshcore-stats: Dashboards and historical metrics for repeaters & companion nodes

messages.author: jorijn
messages.text: Here's something I've been working on recently: A monitoring system for MeshCore that gathers metrics from your repeater and companion nodes, stores them in a SQLite database, and creates a static site with interactive charts. It offers views for day, week, month, and year of battery and radio statistics. The system can be deployed via Docker or using native Python scripts. Live demo: https://meshcore.jorijn.com Source: https://github.com/jorijn/meshcore-stats
messages.content_html: Here's something I've been working on recently: A monitoring system for MeshCore that gathers metrics from your repeater and companion nodes, stores them in a SQLite database, and creates a static site with interactive charts. It offers views for day, week, month, and year of battery and radio statistics. The system can be deployed via Docker or using native Python scripts. Live demo: https://meshcore.jorijn.com Source: https://github.com/jorijn/meshcore-stats
embeds_html:
NL-OOS-RP-jorijn.com — Day — MeshCore Stats
Live stats for MeshCore LoRa repeater in Oosterhout, NL. Battery, signal strength, packet counts, and uptime charts.

GitHub - jorijn/meshcore-stats
Contribute to jorijn/meshcore-stats development by creating an account on GitHub.

messages.author: Kiril
messages.text: Can you run this software on a raspberry pi 4? The docker compose throws "Container meshcore-stats Error " (edited)
